label: Portal center organic drift — FBM-driven wandering origin
notes: Added FBM-driven center offset before polar coordinate calculation. center = (fbm(t*0.07, 0.30)*2-1, fbm(t*0.05, 0.71)*2-1) * 0.18. FBM evaluated at different seeds per axis for independent x/y motion. ±0.18 in aspect-corrected space — visible drift without leaving frame. Non-periodic so path never repeats. uv -= center before computing r and angle so entire polar system (arms, rings, domain warp) follows the wandering eye.

operations.note: Added center drift block before polar coordinate computation
operations.before: uv fixed at frame center for polar calculation
